short_info: UP Joint Entrance Examination has released the online application for JEECUP admission 2026 will start from 15 January 2026 and the last date to apply will be 10 May 2026.candidates should read the JEECUP 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, college and course List, information and other types of information and then apply WhatsApp Join Now Telegram Join Now UP Joint Entrance Examination JEECUP 2026 Online Form Uttar Pradesh Polytechnic Diploma Admission 2026 UPJEE Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification

rows: UP Polytechnic JEECUP Admissions 2026 Download Admit Card

UP Joint Entrance Examination has released the online application for JEECUP admission 2026 will start from 15 January 2026 and the last date to apply will be 10 May 2026.candidates should read the JEECUP 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, college and course List, information and other types of information and then apply

tables.table_name: JEECUP UPJEE Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2026 Minimum Age : 14 Years. Maximum Age : NA Candidate Date of Birth for Admission 2026 Should be on or Before 01/07/2012.
rows: Class 10 Exam Passed with 35% Marks, PCM 50% Marks
Class 10 Exam with Agriculture Subject, PCM & Agriculture 50% Marks
Modern Officer Management and Secretarial Service
Passed 10+2 (Intermediate) Exam and Hindi and English Subject in High School and Intermediate Level Exam
10+2 Exam in Science Stream with 50% Marks
B.Sc. Degree in Biology, Chemistry or Bio Chemistry Subjects
Bachelor Degree in Any Stream in Any Recognized University in India.
PG Diploma in Marketing and Sales Management, PG Diploma in Customer One Year Service Management
PG Diploma in Tourism and Travel Management, Beauty and Health Care, Advertising and Public Relation, Textile Design, Fashion Technology
PG Diploma in Mass Communication, Computer Hardware and Networking, Web Designing, Accountancy with Computerized Account and Taxation, Retail Management
Diploma in Hotel Management and Catering
10+2 Exam (Intermediate) with PCM Group Subjects with 50% Marks in Physics or Chemistry Subjects
10+2 Exam ( Intermediate ) with PCM Group Subjects with 50% Marks in Physics or Chemistry Subjects
10+2 Exam with Science Stream or Class 10 Exam with ITI Certificate
BE / B.Tech Degree in Any Stream with 2 Year Experience OR Diploma in Engineering with 5 Year Experience.

text_sections.section: How to Fill UPJEE JEECUP Polytechnic Admission 2026
text_sections.content: Photo Instruction : Upload Color Passport Size Photo with Candidates Name and Photo Taken Date (Photo Not Be Older Than 3 Month) | Thumb Impression : Uploaded Left Hand Thumb Impression | Signature Instruction : Candidates Signature in Running Hand (Capital Letter Signature Not Accepted) | No Need to Send Confirmation Page to JEECUP 2026 | For More Details Must Read the Notification.
